---
**Merge checklist (GAEO):**
- [ ] kernel selftest green (CI)
- [ ] schemas valid (CI)
- [ ] ADR added/updated if architectural
- [ ] independent review (Codex / CodeRabbit) recorded
- [ ] rollback documented
- [ ] `neo` approval (required on protected branches)
